creator: col@rsmmail.com
text: One other note. I have been able to boot only the 7010 desktop intermittently, but only if I load default settings, turn off legacy boot, disable the internal NIC PXE, and do not have any PCIe NIC cards installed. Same procedure has no effect on the SFF's. The SFF's have never been able to boot FreeBSD in UEFI mode, but boot all other OS's just fine. Subsequent boots on the desktop sometimes also freeze.
